import re, unicodedata, difflib, math, statistics

# Arabic normalization helpers
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06DC\u06DF-\u06ED]')
tatweel = '\u0640'
punc_pattern = re.compile(r'[\u200c-\u206f!"#$%&\'()*+,\-./:;<=>?@\[\]^_`{|}~،؛؟…«»ـ]')

def normalize_ar(s):
    if not isinstance(s, str):
        return ""
    s = s.replace(tatweel, '')
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    s = punc_pattern.sub(' ', s)
    s = s.replace('إ', 'ا').replace('أ', 'ا').replace('آ', 'ا')
    s = s.replace('ؤ', 'و').replace('ئ', 'ي').replace('ء', '')
    s = s.replace('ة', 'ه').replace('ى', 'ي')
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip().lower()
    return s

def sim_ratio(a, b):
    a_n = normalize_ar(a)
    b_n = normalize_ar(b)
    return difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, a_n, b_n).ratio()

def token_f1(a, b):
    a_tokens = normalize_ar(a).split()
    b_tokens = normalize_ar(b).split()
    aset = set(a_tokens)
    bset = set(b_tokens)
    common = aset & bset
    if not aset or not bset:
        return 0.0
    prec = len(common)/len(aset)
    rec = len(common)/len(bset)
    if prec+rec==0: 
        f1=0.0
    else:
        f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
    # Weighted by proportion of common tokens relative to longer set as a secondary score
    jacc = len(common)/len(aset|bset) if aset or bset else 0
    return f1, prec, rec, jacc

def robust_similarity(a, b):
    r = sim_ratio(a,b)
    f1, prec, rec, jacc = token_f1(a,b)
    # Combine metrics
    # Weighted: 0.6 ratio + 0.3 jacc + 0.1 f1
    score = 0.6*r + 0.3*jacc + 0.1*f1
    return score, {'ratio': r, 'jacc': jacc, 'f1': f1, 'prec': prec, 'rec': rec}

orig_full = "يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لَا تَتَوَلَّوْا وُدَّ الْقَوْمِ عَلَيْكُمْ صَدَغَةً وَدُحُضوا عَلَيْكُمْ كَمَا دَحَضَ الْكَذِبُ عَلَى الْحَقِ يُضِلُّونَ عَن سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ مَن يَتَضِلُّ اللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِي لَهُ سَبِيلًا"
snippet = "يَا أَيُّه...ُ سَبِيلًا" # Not helpful

print("Normalized:", normalize_ar(orig_full)[:200])

def top_matches_quran(query, topn=20):
    scores = []
    for rec in quran_data:
        text = rec['ayah_text']
        s, metrics = robust_similarity(query, text)
        scores.append((s, metrics, rec))
    scores.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
    return scores[:topn]

top = top_matches_quran(orig_full, 20)
[(round(s,3), rec['surah_id'], rec['ayah_id'], rec['ayah_text'][:60]) for s, metrics, rec in top]
